source: Generated from a per-system Morphous manifest and prompt records. CSS variables are shadcn/tweakcn-compatible.
typography: Friendly English UI with Japanese typography guidance for community dashboards, shared records, table labels, search commands, and calm cooperative status copy.
layout: Welcoming community dashboards, compact shared navigation, 8px radii, clover-green actions, white-bloom highlights, soil-brown emphasis states, meadow-neutral surfaces, and vein-line texture.

prompts.label: Transparent Clover motif
prompts.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Morphous Clover transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create a single friendly clover leaf motif with one small white clover bloom, isolated for a transparent cutout.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid #ff00ff chroma-key background for background removal.
Subject: a healthy green trifoliate clover leaf with rounded heart-shaped leaflets, visible pale veins, a short slender stem, one compact white clover bloom beside it, and a tiny hint of soil-brown root crumb at the base only.
Style/medium: high-detail botanical cutout, natural light, realistic painted-photographic finish, crisp opaque edges.
Composition/framing: centered complete subject, generous padding on all sides, no cropping, no floor plane.
Lighting/mood: friendly community system mood, bright but soft, no cast shadow and no contact shadow.
Color palette: leaf green, pale leaf-vein green, white clover bloom, soil brown, meadow neutral highlights only; do not use magenta in the subject.
Transparent workflow: the background must be one uniform #ff00ff color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, or lighting variation. Keep the subject fully separated from the background with crisp edges.
Avoid: four-leaf lucky icon stylization, pot, vase, hand, insects, landscape, text, watermark, extra decorative colors, shadows, reflections.

prompts.label: Light-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution light-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible transparent Clover motif.png as the source reference for colors, texture, and system identity.
Primary request: Generate a comprehensive light-mode shadcn/tweakcn-like design-system board titled "Morphous Clover".
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: friendly community system for meadow coordination, co-op dashboards, neighborhood garden records, welcoming operational UI, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: fresh clover leaf green, deeper leaflet green, pale leaf-vein green, white clover bloom, soil brown, meadow stone neutrals, warm white surface. Avoid unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, beige-dominant styling, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "クローバー", "共同の記録", "状態", "検索".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, community metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle clover vein line texture, rounded leaflet rhythm, white bloom dot pattern, soil-speckle dividers, meadow-neutral borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.

prompts.label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompts.prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: 16:9 high-resolution dark-mode design-system board for Morphous catalog
Input images: use the visible Clover motif.png and the visible Morphous Clover light board as source references.
Primary request: Generate a separate dark-mode translation titled "Morphous Clover" with the same friendly community-system coverage and layout logic as the light board.
Canvas: 3840 x 2160, 16:9, crisp readable UI labels and token names, no tiny text.
Required visible sections: dark palette, type, Japanese typography, components, navigation, dashboard/data, forms, tables, command/search, status, tokens, texture, radius, spacing, shadows.
System mood: friendly community system for meadow coordination, night-mode shared records dashboard, welcoming operational UI, 8px radii throughout.
Color palette: derive only from the reference motif: deep soil brown and dark leaf green backgrounds, fresh clover green primary controls, pale leaf-vein green accents, white clover bloom foregrounds/highlights, meadow stone borders, muted soil-neutral surfaces. Avoid neon colors, unrelated saturated colors, generic purple or blue gradients, and stock UI-kit colors.
Layout: polished dark design board, left palette/token rail, central component and form examples, right dashboard/table/search/status modules, bottom row for texture, radius, spacing, shadow samples. Include a small motif cutout preview.
Typography: clear English UI type plus Japanese typography section with headings, body, captions, numerals, and examples such as "クローバー", "共同の記録", "状態", "検索".
Components: buttons, inputs, select, textarea, checkbox, radio, switch, tabs, badges, alert, card, table rows, command/search palette, compact sidebar navigation, community metric cards, chart lines/bars, loading/empty/error/success states.
Texture/materials: subtle dark clover-vein texture, rounded leaflet rhythm, white bloom dot pattern, soil-speckle panels, meadow-neutral borders.
Constraints: every visible UI element uses 8px radius or less; labels must fit inside containers; professional product design board; no marketing hero, no abstract gradients, no extra colors beyond motif-derived palette, no watermark.
